song.title: I Will Offer Up My Life
song.author: Matt Redman
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D D/F# G A D I will offer up my life |in spirit and truth, . D/F# G A D Pouring out the oil of love |as my worship to You . D/F# G A Bm In surrender I must give my every part; . Bm/A G A D Lord, receive this sacrifice |of a broken heart
[C] . G A D Jesus, what can I give, what can I bring . D/F# G A D To so faithful a Friend, to so loving a King? . D/F# G A D Savior, what can be said, what can be sung|| . D/F# G As a praise of Your name . A D For the things You have done? . Em D/F# G Oh my words cannot tell, not even in part, . Em D/F# G Of the debt of love that is owed . A D By this thankful heart
[V2] You deserve my every breath For You've paid the great cost; Giving up Your life to death, Even death on a cross. You took all my shame away, There freed me from sin, Opened up the kingdom here And have beckoned me in.
